LanguageData.DefenderIncubatorResearch.description: Unlock the Defender Incubator, a hemogel-fed brood organ that can release groups of fingerspikes when commanded or when the colony is attacked.
LanguageData.DefenderIncubatorResearch.label: defender incubator
LanguageData.FB_BroodMotherResearch.description: Unlock the Symbiosis Brood Womb, an advanced brood organ that uses hemogel, biomass, and stored skill essence to grow basic combat beasts and simple worker strains on demand.
LanguageData.FB_BroodMotherResearch.generalRules.rule: subject_story->refined defender gestation into controlled fleshbeast breeding
subject_story->engineered a living womb for colony-grown monstrosities
LanguageData.FB_BroodMotherResearch.label: brood mother
LanguageData.FB_AdaptiveHarvesters.description: Unlock sinewcallers, scrapmeld seeds, and graftmaws: specialized fleshbeasts that draw in prey, repurpose mechanized remains, and graft useful tissue from bodies.
LanguageData.FB_AdaptiveHarvesters.generalRules.rules: subject_story->grew predatory organs into specialized harvesters
subject_story->taught colony beasts to gather bodies, beasts, and machine remains
LanguageData.FB_AdaptiveHarvesters.label: adaptive harvesters
LanguageData.FB_NeuralDominion.description: Unlock cocoonbacks and thrallblooms: advanced control fleshbeasts built for capture, living transport, and domination of hostile minds.
LanguageData.FB_NeuralDominion.generalRules.rulesStri: subject_story->cultivated beasts for capture and mental control
subject_story->bound hostile minds through living neural organs
LanguageData.FB_NeuralDominion.label: neural dominion
LanguageData.FB_FriendlyCaptureRecognition.descriptio: Teach grasping flesh organs to recognize allied and neutral bio-signatures, preventing automatic capture of non-hostile pawns.
LanguageData.FB_FriendlyCaptureRecognition.generalRul: subject_story->learned to distinguish allies from targets
subject_story->trained flesh organs to ignore friendly bio-signatures
LanguageData.FB_FriendlyCaptureRecognition.label: friend-or-foe recognition
LanguageData.FB_CapillaryTrawling.description: Unlock the Capillary Trawler, a vascular filter-organ that spreads fine nets through nearby water and converts gathered aquatic biomass into hemogel for the colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_CapillaryTrawling.label: capillary trawling
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunneling.description: Unlock the Flesh Tunnel Maw, a massive mouth-organ that spends stored hemogel to bore a permanent passage to a distant world tile.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunneling.generalRules.rulesStri: subject_story->bored permanent passages through living tissue
subject_story->grew mouths that bite through the world
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunneling.label: flesh tunneling
LanguageData.FB_GalvanicCysts.description: Unlock the Galvanic Cyst, a compact electrocyte organ that consumes hemogel to feed an electrical grid while holding a small bioelectric reserve.
LanguageData.FB_GalvanicCysts.generalRules.rulesStrin: subject_story->cultivated electrocyte tissue into power organs
LanguageData.FB_GalvanicCysts.label: galvanic cysts
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubation.description: Unlock the Tissue Incubator, a living chamber that memorizes delivered meat and leather samples and grows matching materials from hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubation.generalRules.rulesSt: subject_story->memorized meat and leather samples in living tissue
LanguageData.FB_TissueIncubation.label: tissue incubation
LanguageData.FB_PhotosyntheticFleshtree.description: Unlock the Fleshtree fusion process, allowing multiple photosynthetic fleshleaves to merge into a larger organ-tree with greater hemogel production and storage.
subject_story->merged solar flesh growths into a single organism
LanguageData.FB_PhotosyntheticFleshtree.label: photosynthetic fleshtree
LanguageData.FeederResearch.description: Unlock the Feeder, an organic dispenser where hungry flesh-bound colonists can take hemogel-grown meals from its interaction cells.
LanguageData.FeederResearch.label: feeder
LanguageData.FleshmassEngineering.description: Establish the basic principles of hemogel-grown colony tissue, opening the path to more specialized organic structures.
LanguageData.FleshmassEngineering.label: fleshmass engineering
LanguageData.FleshSeedCreation.description: Unlock the Spore-Cradle, allowing the colony to craft organic components and flesh seeds that can be planted into living equipment.
LanguageData.FleshSeedCreation.label: flesh seed creation
LanguageData.MinionsHiveResearch.description: Unlock the Minion Broodseed and its hive, which gestates sclerats for construction work within the colony.
LanguageData.MinionsHiveResearch.label: minions hive
LanguageData.ParasiteEggConversion.description: Unlock parasite egg crafting in the Spore-Cradle, allowing the colony to grow personality parasite eggs through controlled organic incubation.
LanguageData.ParasiteEggConversion.generalRules.rules: subject_story->adapted spore-cradle tissue to grow parasite eggs
subject_story->shaped biomass into parasitic incubation chambers
LanguageData.ParasiteEggConversion.label: parasite egg incubation
LanguageData.PhotosyntheticFleshleaf.description: Unlock the Photosynthetic Fleshleaf, a living photosynthetic organ that converts light into hemogel and transfers its reserves to the colony heart.
LanguageData.PhotosyntheticFleshleaf.label: photosynthetic fleshleaf
LanguageData.SpitterResearch.description: Unlock the Spitter Gland, a defensive flesh organ that grows from an embryo and spits corrosive fluid at distant enemies.
LanguageData.SpitterResearch.label: spitter gland
LanguageData.TentacleTurretResearch.description: Unlock the Tentacle Turret, a rooted flesh defense that batters nearby enemies with tentacles and launches keratin spines at distant targets.
LanguageData.TentacleTurretResearch.label: tentacle turret
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveLattice.description: Grow auxiliary nerve nodes that expand the colony heart's grasping tendril capacity and allow the heart to choose prey through finer species and faction recognition.
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveLattice.generalRules.rule: subject_story->threaded capture reflexes through auxiliary nerve nodes
subject_story->trained grasping organs to recognize chosen prey profiles
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveLattice.label: capture nerve lattice
LanguageData.FB_GeoferriteGlands.description: Unlock geyser-rooted organs that refine hemogel into bioferrite.
LanguageData.FB_GeoferriteGlands.generalRules.rulesSt: subject_story->rooted flesh organs into steam geysers
subject_story->refined hemogel into bioferrite under geothermal pressure
LanguageData.FB_GeoferriteGlands.label: geoferrite glands
